title: CitrusPackhouseOperation
description: Data model designed for operational management and traceability in the citrus transformation and packing industry. It records raw-material batch intake, quality parameters (calibers, ripeness, etc.), control of processing/packing operations, and finished-product inventory ready for distribution. It combines industry-supplied data on suppliers' parcels with parcel attributes extracted from SIGPAC. Sensitive identifiers are anonymized by hashing.

id.description: Property. Unique identifier of the entity.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity Type. It has to be CitrusPackhouseOperation.

nomIndustriaHash.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Hashed identifier of the agri-food industry (packhouse).

proveedorHash.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Hashed identifier of the product supplier.

nPartida.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Batch (lot) number within the crop and campaign.

nomCultivoHash.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Hashed identifier of the crop and estate.

fincaHash.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Hashed identifier of the estate (finca).

usoSig.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Agronomic land use of the plot according to SIGPAC.

supData.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'ha'. Parcel area according to supplied data.

supSig.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'ha'. Parcel area according to SIGPAC.

sigParcelasHash.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Hashed cadastral references of the parcels (SIGPAC).

perimParc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'm'. Parcels perimeter according to SIGPAC.

rendData.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 't/ha'. Yield according to supplied data.

rendSig.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 't/ha'. Yield calculated with SIGPAC data.

prodData.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 't'. Production according to supplied data.

prodSig.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 't'. Production calculated with SIGPAC data.

peso.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'kg'. Weight associated with each quality category.

giqc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. GIQC index (global internal quality coefficient).

porcentaje.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage that this category represents of the batch total.

iqc.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. IQC index (internal quality coefficient).

fechaPlan.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Year associated with the plantation.

oriDom.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Dominant orientation of the parcel.

oriE.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with East orientation.

oriN.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with North orientation.

oriS.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with South orientation.

oriW.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with West orientation.

pdteMedia.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Mean slope of the parcel.

pdte05.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with slope 0-5%.

pdte510.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with slope 5-10%.

pdte1030.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with slope 10-30%.

pdte30Max.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: '%'. Percentage of surface with slope greater than 30%.

dataOwner.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Owner of the data.
